Your Instructor

Mariam Manjavidze

Verified
BuilderVibe CoderUX/UI Maxi

Tbilisi-based product designer who got tired of watching smart people feel locked out of tech. Spent years shipping products for startups — then AI tools changed everything. Now I teach complete beginners to build real AI products in 7 weeks. No fluff. No gatekeeping. Just builds.

7-Week Program

Your Path From Zero to Builder

A structured 7-week journey — each week builds on the last, taking you from complete beginner to someone who ships real AI-powered products.

Week 1Foundation
01

Intro to AI & Vibe Coding

GPT-4o
Claude
DALL·E
Midj.

Understand the modern builder mindset, what AI tools can do, and how to think like a product creator from day one.

hover →
Week 2Core Skill
02

Prompt Engineering

U
“Design a SaaS dashboard”▌
✓
Dashboard ready · 318 lines

Learn to communicate with AI precisely — write prompts that produce real results, not generic outputs.

Prompt anatomyContext framingIteration
hover →
Week 3Product
03

Design Thinking → MVP

💡
Think
Design
🚀
MVP
Ship

Turn any raw idea into a scoped, shippable product. Learn user-focused frameworks that real product teams use.

User researchProblem framingMVP scoping
hover →
Week 4Build
04

Build MVP with AI Tools

building with AI▌

Ship a real, working product using AI-first tools. No code required — just vision, prompts, and iteration.

No-code toolsAI-first buildDeploy live
hover →
Week 5Automate
05

Automation & Workflow

Stop doing things manually. Design workflows where AI handles the repetitive work so you can focus on what matters.

AI workflowsTriggers & actionsSmart routing
hover →
Week 6Platforms
06

Automation Platforms

Go deep on Make, Zapier, and n8n. Build multi-step automations that connect your tools and eliminate manual busywork.

MakeZapiern8n
hover →

A working web app

From blank page to live URL in one session. You'll build and deploy a real working app — no stack knowledge needed.

hover me

An automated workflow

Your tools talk to each other while you sleep. Make, Zapier, n8n — set once, run forever. You just watch the magic happen.

hover me

A shipped AI product

gm world 🚀 — a real thing, live on the internet, built by you. From zero to something people can actually use.

Standalone Mini-Courses

Pick One Topic. Learn it deeply.

Each module is a self-contained mini-course you can take independently — no need to enroll in the full program. Start with what matters to you most.
